Event:
Event Date:
Sage Bot Item Code: A140
Sunny Jewel

Triggers: Once in a while

A wave of light sweeps across the battlefield. When the wave passes through allies, it restores 20% of their max health and removes 2 debuffs from them.
When the wave passes through enemies, it deals 96000 pure damage and blinds them for 3 sec. Blinded enemies have a 35% chance to miss their target, and take 64000 magic damage for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
